package_description: Retrofit programme for winglet installation, aerodynamic drag reduction, and engine performance improvement on existing long-haul fleet. Reduces ATF consumption by 8% on retrofitted aircraft.
rollout_limit_notes: National adoption bound reflecting long aircraft retirement cycles (~25 yr life), international fleet commonality requirements, and Australian carrier market structure.
evidence_summary: Boeing winglet retrofit programme; Airbus sharklet data; Engine alliance GP7200 performance improvement programmes.
derivation_method: Energy coefficients from AES 2023-24 international aviation bunkers (165 PJ) / BITRE 70,000 million_pkm = 2357.0 GJ/million_pkm. NGGI check: 168.5 tCO2e/million_pkm × 70,000 / 1e6 = 11.8 MtCO2e.
review_notes: Constrained by fleet age and international retrofit certification requirements.

package_label: Operational efficiency — load factor and route optimisation
package_description: Improved load factor management, collaborative route planning, and reduced approach/taxi fuel burn across international operations. Reduces ATF consumption by 6%. Applies to conventional jet and SAF blend states.
rollout_limit_notes: National adoption bound reflecting long aircraft retirement cycles (~25 yr life), international fleet commonality requirements, and Australian carrier market structure.
evidence_summary: IATA Fly Net Zero; ICAO CORSIA operational improvement packages; Qantas and Virgin Australia operational efficiency reporting.
derivation_method: Energy coefficients from AES 2023-24 international aviation bunkers (165 PJ) / BITRE 70,000 million_pkm = 2357.0 GJ/million_pkm. NGGI check: 168.5 tCO2e/million_pkm × 70,000 / 1e6 = 11.8 MtCO2e.
review_notes: Operational efficiency well-documented but gains partially saturated in leading carriers.
